---
title: "Spatial IV Benchmark"
format: gfm
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
helper <- if (file.exists("analysis/_analysis_helpers.R")) "analysis/_analysis_helpers.R" else "../_analysis_helpers.R"
source(helper)
```

This notebook renders the legacy eval=FALSE Chunk 30 spatial-IV attempts. These are exploratory benchmarks only. A status of `estimated` means the current `ivreg()` call returned an object; it does not promote the model to the final paper.

```{r status, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("benchmarking", "spatial_iv", "spatial_iv_model_status.csv"), "Spatial-IV model status")
```

```{r diagnostics, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("benchmarking", "spatial_iv", "spatial_iv_diagnostics_summary.csv"), "IV diagnostic summaries")
```

```{r coeffs, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("benchmarking", "spatial_iv", "spatial_iv_coefficient_summary.csv"), "Default coefficient summaries")
```

```{r clustered, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("benchmarking", "spatial_iv", "spatial_iv_clustered_coefficient_summary.csv"), "Clustered-SE coeftest attempt")
```
